Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionBranchCondition, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement> implements IExecutionBranchCondition
An implementation of IExecutionLoopCondition which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface IExecutionNode

    INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_END, INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_START

  • Constructor Details

    • KeYlessBranchCondition

      public KeYlessBranchCondition(IExecutionNode<?> parent, String name, String formatedPathCondition, boolean pathConditionChanged, String formatedBranchCondition, boolean mergedBranchCondition, boolean branchConditionComputed, String additionalBranchLabel)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
      name - The name of this node.
      formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
      pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
      formatedBranchCondition - The formated branch condition.
      mergedBranchCondition - Merged branch condition?
      branchConditionComputed - Is branch condition computed?
      additionalBranchLabel - The optional additional branch label.

  • Method Details

    • getElementType

      public String getElementType()
      Returns a human readable element type name.
      Specified by:
      getElementType in interface IExecutionElement
      Returns:
      The human readable element type.

    • getBranchCondition

      public JTerm getBranchCondition()

      Returns the branch condition as JTerm.

      If this branch conditions merged proof nodes this JTerm is the overall branch condition.

      Specified by:
      getBranchCondition in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The branch condition as JTerm.

    • getFormatedBranchCondition

      public String getFormatedBranchCondition()
      Returns the human readable branch condition as string.
      Specified by:
      getFormatedBranchCondition in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The human readable branch condition.

    • isMergedBranchCondition

      public boolean isMergedBranchCondition()
      Checks if this branch condition is a merged one.
      Specified by:
      isMergedBranchCondition in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      true is merged branch condition, false is normal branch condition.

    • getMergedProofNodes

      public Node[] getMergedProofNodes()

      Returns the branch condition nodes in KeY's proof tree which are merged into this IExecutionBranchCondition.

      It includes also IExecutionElement.getProofNode().

      Specified by:
      getMergedProofNodes in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The merged proof nodes.

    • getMergedBranchCondtions

      public JTerm[] getMergedBranchCondtions() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the branch condition JTerms.
      Specified by:
      getMergedBranchCondtions in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The branch condition JTerms.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • isBranchConditionComputed

      public boolean isBranchConditionComputed()
      Checks if the value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() is already computed.
      Specified by:
      isBranchConditionComputed in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      true value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() is already computed, false value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() needs to be computed.

    • getAdditionalBranchLabel

      public String getAdditionalBranchLabel()
      Returns the optional additional branch label.
      Specified by:
      getAdditionalBranchLabel in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The additional branch label if available or null if not available.
